Here is information about a user and a new Digital Music "Earth Wind & Fire: Greatest Hits" being recommended to the user. For the user, we have the user's review history. For the new item being recommended, we have the item review history by other users.

### User Review History ###
1. One of These Nights
Positive Aspects: None mentioned
Negative Aspects: Annoying songs, Overly-orchestrated, Brainless lyrics
User Preference Elements: Song quality, Lyrics, Musical style

2. Eagles : The Very Best Of (2CD)
Positive Aspects: None mentioned
Negative Aspects: Lack of innovation, Whiny/self-important songs, Lack of creativity or talent
User Preference Elements: Originality, Creativity, Talent

3. First Rays of the New Rising Sun
Positive Aspects: Genuine article, Must-haves for serious Hendrix fans, Perfect lyrics, Perfect melody, Perfect instrumentation, Masterpiece, Variety of songs (rockers, ballads, funk), Interesting turn in Hendrix's music
Negative Aspects: None mentioned
User Preference Elements: Quality of music, Variety of songs, Historical significance, Authenticity of recordings

4. Hot Pants
Positive Aspects: Funky, Lengthy Vamps, Semi-Improvised Vocals, Classic Tracks, Great Sax Part
Negative Aspects: Only Four Songs, Inexplicably Divided Tracks
User Preference Elements: Funkiness, Length of Tracks, Party Record Quality

5. The Payback
Positive Aspects: Great songs like the title track, Stone to the Bone, and Mind Power, Funky jams, Tight-wound jams
Negative Aspects: Running times of songs, Reinventing classic title song, Failed Curtis Mayfield impression on ballad
User Preference Elements: Song quality, Length of songs, Musical innovation, Variety in music style

6. Mothership Connection
Positive Aspects: Unique concept album, Funky music, Memorable tracks, Talented musicians
Negative Aspects: Weakest song on the album, Traditional love song not related to concept
User Preference Elements: Creative storytelling, Catchy tunes, Musical talent, Humorous elements

7. Pretenders
Positive Aspects: Distinct sound, Skilled musicians, Catchy hits, Charismatic singer
Negative Aspects: Lack of consistency in album quality, Generic rock songs, Forgettable tracks
User Preference Elements: Cohesive album experience, Variety in music style, Strong vocals

8. Pet Sounds
Positive Aspects: Good a-sides, Better than some Beach Boys hits, Influence on '60s rock
Negative Aspects: Rest of the album sounds silly and dated, Lack of good lyricist or instrumentalist, Overrated
User Preference Elements: Timeless quality, Interesting lyrics, Solid instrumentalists, Great melodies

9. Otis Blue
Positive Aspects: Classic soul songs, great covers, funky and soulful sound
Negative Aspects: Limp rendition of "My Girl"
User Preference Elements: Soulful music, classic hits, enjoyable listening experience

10. Pithecanthropus Erectus
Positive Aspects: Daring sonic exploration, Unique sound, Creative use of real-life sounds, Lovely sax solo
Negative Aspects: Boring and directionless track
User Preference Elements: Experimental music, Innovation, Traditional jazz elements
